taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Engineering, Data Engineer
core_skills: Python, SQL, Market data platform pipelines, Financial data, Snowflake
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, SQL:1.0, Market data platform pipelines:0.0, Financial data:0.0, Snowflake:0.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, 4 – 6 years in a software development focused role, Proficient in Python and SQL, Excellent communication skills and the ability to work with, and inspire, a wide cross section of data professionals
preferred_quals: Knowledge of fixed income products (options, swaps, futures, etc.), Familiarity with AWS ecosystem, Understanding of streaming pipelines, Awareness of key financial vendors (e.g. Bloomberg, Refinitiv, FactSet), Knowledge of OLAP platforms and workloads using tools like Snowflake or Trino, Experience with timeseries databases (e.g. ArcticDB, KDB+), Experience working with trading teams, data teams and infrastructure teams
core_responsibilities: Contribute to the design, build and support of a world class data platform that covers real time market data, unstructured data and alternative data, Develop data solutions that enable investment professionals to efficiently extract insights from data, Build tools and automation capabilities for data pipelines that improve the efficiency, quality and resilience of our data platform, Working directly with Product and Portfolio Managers to understand their data needs and provide end-to-end data solutions that address requirements, Work with timeseries databases (e.g. ArcticDB, KDB+) to store, query, and manage dense time-series data effectively, Build out data quality and integrity tools to ensure robust data validation and error handling, Investigate data issues, working with data providers to ensure seamless interconnection between different data sets
job_summary: Capstone Investment Advisors is a leading asset management firm specializing in derivatives and complementary strategies. As a Data Engineer, you will build and maintain a market data platform, develop data solutions for investment professionals, and ensure data quality and integrity while working closely with product and portfolio managers.
